title: Less Leaf Litter (LLL)
description: Reduces the amount of leaf litter that spawns in forests and dark forests, only making it appear under some trees instead of under all of them
body:
**This datapack/mod reduces the amount of leaf litter that spawns in forests and dark forests, only making it appear under some trees instead of under all of them.**

I've always hated how there is leaf litter everywhere in the Forest and Dark forest Floor and I think it looks very ugly and unnatural. Making it generate under fewer trees improves it massively in my opionion.

Additionally, a few birch trees in forests will have wildflowers under them instead of leaf litter adding more vibrant colours to them

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77938306a1e31ae6eddc4020b28f7af1890444b5_0.webp)
